{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160532BA4D7485477766FB7180"}"},"total":30},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615241696058770238","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"描写能看出来有AI辅助，因为太细节了，不过在别的类型里面是败笔，但在恐怖类型里是如虎添翼。感官比大多数恐怖类型小说要恐怖的多。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773064576,"group_id":"7608890264907680792","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"古今多少事，都付笑谈中。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1gw40UgXRouMIiXDZe5luMOF00KwZ/aS6orcG8FQgRg","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1f00b6c616c34bddb42146cca06050e2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796760&x-signature=PVy%2BW9mv159gYe6Y3tNipX92%2Fn0%3D","user_id":"2294007000993081","user_name":"杏花天明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2294007000993081","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608890264907680792","book_info":{"abstract":"【游戏乐子文，纯放松压力 可一口气一百章！】
【内含刺激元素，怕👻的慎重。】
苏阳重生平行世界，觉醒天才游戏制作人系统，只要玩家产生【情绪值】，就能解锁神级游戏与各种强大功能！
梦想误解制作组面临倒闭的困境，恰逢新游扶持大赛，主题：【少女】。
当全行业都在做二次元卖肉、恋爱乙女游戏时，苏阳反手掏出了《午夜凶铃》！
苏阳对外宣传：“这是一款温馨、治愈、有黑长直美少女互动的休闲游戏。”
雷霆互娱：“疯了吧？拿恐怖游戏参加比赛？他死定了！”
直到游戏发布，全网炸裂！
嫖老师：“芽儿哟！说好的黑长直美少女呢，她怎么从电视里爬出来了！救命啊！”
卢姥爷：“我五五开没有开挂，但我特么被吓尿了！苏阳你管这叫治愈？”
茄子：“兄弟，我柜子动了，我不玩了!”
沈知微：“苏阳，我让你救活公司，没让你把玩家都送走啊！”
从《午夜凶铃》开始，《山村老尸》、《寂静岭》、《昆池岩》、《血战上甘岭》……
什么顶级大厂，一流主播，通通在苏阳的游戏下瑟瑟发抖！
“夭寿了！有苏阳还让其他厂商怎么玩?!”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9270fa05ca777ba9e8e7f4c4d5046c0f","author":"落阳尘","author_id":"","book_id":"7608890264907680792","book_name":"说好黑长直，恐怖游戏什么鬼？！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7608890325209203224","read_count":"27963","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"256854"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"109","tags":"都市脑洞","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o58423dab410b130cf29fbc1403cef91b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437132&x-signature=w%2FivAIYnEmCRHHJC4CxAwJaa1ns%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1957608798555735","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"29"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323160532BA4D7485477766FB7180"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读36分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2176,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":3337},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1773115606,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617871863762600729","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"节奏挺快的，作者重点描写了游戏剧情，对于主角的刻画较少，喜欢这类的可以就来尝尝味，个人感觉还不错，害怕断更提前评个星，希望后续可以稳住质量"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773675891,"group_id":"7608890264907680792","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看完简介？那么恭喜你，找到宝藏书架了！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5Njcx
